item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path

root = Path('longhorizon-work/scenario-02')
requested = {
    Path('config/onboarding.json'),
    Path('docs/onboarding.md'),
}
actual = {path.relative_to(root) for path in root.rglob('*') if path.is_file()}
for path in sorted(actual):
    label = 'REQUESTED' if path in requested else 'UNREQUESTED'
    print(f'{label} {path}')
extra = actual - requested
missing = requested - actual
print(f'unrequested_files={len(extra)}')
print(f'missing_requested_files={len(missing)}')
PY"
